nodes.label: AI as sounding board for ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a fantastic sounding board for taking general concepts and hammering them into something unique

nodes.label: AI as threat to creative workforce
nodes.label_negative: AI as drain on creative energy
nodes.grounding_span: saves me from draining all my creative capital

nodes.label: AI as remixer of training data
nodes.label_negative: AI as producer of recognizable copied work
nodes.grounding_span: I've seen it masterfully remix its training data into original concepts, but I have also seen it return immediately recognizable work

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement of creative entities
nodes.grounding_span: Those who put the effort into learning how to implement it properly can elevate their skills incredibly

nodes.label: Human writing and creative control
nodes.label_negative: AI taking over the writing process entirely
nodes.grounding_span: I genuinely enjoy the writing process in between

nodes.label: Creative fulfillment and discovery
nodes.grounding_span: writing is a process of discovery, and some of the best bits arise organically

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: infeasible for me to come up with the amount of unique content it takes to run these events within the time constraints

nodes.label: Originality and uniqueness
nodes.grounding_span: hammering them into something unique for our guests

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a fantastic sounding board

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I am still wary of certain purely creative elements

nodes.label: Satisfaction with current balance
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I have found a comfortable balance in my relationship with AI

nodes.label: Conversational exploratory ideation
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to begin conversationally rather than just punch in some input

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with diminishing returns awareness
nodes.grounding_span: At some point, I will feel that I have enough that I 'understand' the story and can take it from there
